subject: Re: Warp 1.07 does not start, no error messages
body:
Found the problem. RivaTuner Statistics server, a program frequently 
bundled with GPU overclocking software, conflicts with Warp.

On Thursday, 19 March 2020 08:20:38 UTC+1, Adrian Koh wrote:
>
> I've tried running via the shortcut, directly in the installation folder, 
> as admin and via compatibility layers to win 7 and win 8.
>
> Does not start. I have a Ryzen 2600, 32GB RAM, 1080ti, latest drivers and 
> all necessary packages. Windows 10 latest update.
>
> No error messages, no processes visible in Task Manager. 
>
> Any ideas?
>
